lane: operator-directed (ChatGPT-scoped, narrow); operator cleared cross-project ownership ('it's all my infra')
guardrail: This packet supervises transport plumbing. It does not certify the observations served through it.
premise_correction: Finding B assumed an unmanaged nq-specific caddy that would not survive reboot. Inspection corrected both: (1) it is a SHARED jbeck-owned caddy:2 container reverse-proxying ~8 domains (juche.social/atproto PDS, sp00ky.net, labelwatch, driftwatch, instantinternet.news, stechometer, nq.neutral.zone); real config /home/jbeck/atproto/Caddyfile (the /root/Caddyfile read earlier was a stale decoy); (2) it was ALREADY reboot-survivable (restart=unless-stopped + docker.service enabled). The real gap was named/explicit/declared management.
did: Wrote /etc/systemd/system/caddy-proxy.service managing the EXISTING container in place (docker start -a caddy) — never recreates, preserves /data LE certs for all 8 domains.
Set container restart policy no -> systemd single supervisor (no docker/systemd double-start).
Enabled on boot (multi-user.target symlink) + After=docker.service ordering.
Handoff: docker stop + systemctl start (brief blip); then systemctl restart to prove ExecStop+ExecStart cycle.
Committed reference copy deploy/examples/caddy-proxy.service with declared image/config/cert paths + rollback in header.

verify.container: managed in place, restart=no, volumes/certs preserved
verify.reboot_survival: asserted via is-enabled + After=docker.service ordering; live reboot of public box NOT performed (unsafe unprompted). Was already docker-reboot-survivable, so this is strictly an improvement.

declared.nq_route: nq.neutral.zone -> 172.17.0.1:9848 (+ 405 holding move on unauthenticated mutation)

rollback: systemctl disable --now caddy-proxy; docker update --restart=unless-stopped caddy; docker start caddy; rm unit + daemon-reload.
scope_guard: Did NOT start #5 receipt gate, touch TLS 2d-b, change NQ app semantics, clean up VM root/UMask, add backup retention, or broaden into VM hardening.
acceptance: Finding B RESOLVED. Loop returns to AUDIT/idle. NEXT: #5 fail-closed receipt re-attestation gate.
